summary.shape_sentence: Early RTH liquidation into late-morning LOD, then steady afternoon trend recovery into a near-HOD close.

goat.note: Standout move was the reversal from late-morning LOD near 27312 into the afternoon breakout above 27440.

red_circles.behavior: Most effective early during the morning selloff; later bearish pivots produced only pauses or shallow pullbacks.

green_circles.behavior: Improved after the 11:25 LOD, marking higher lows and continuation pivots during the afternoon reversal.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 27435-27450 initially capped price, then was broken during the late-day upside drive.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 27310-27330 held at the late-morning low; later demand migrated higher toward 27400.

time_markers.10am_blue: Bearish discovery phase after the open, trading near morning lows around 27345-27360.
time_markers.12pm_red: Bullish reversal underway with price reclaiming from LOD and forming higher lows near 27365-27380.
time_markers.2pm_green: Upper-range bullish consolidation near 27425-27435 after the afternoon trend flip.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Green close near HOD around 27444.75 after late-day breakout.

takeaway: Bullish reversal trend day: early sell pressure into defended demand, followed by a controlled afternoon reclaim and late breakout through supply into a near-HOD close.
